items.text: Paper "Open-loop POMDP simplification and safe skipping of replanning with formal performance guarantees" was accepted to WAFR.
Paper "Simplification of POMDP by adaptive structures with formal performance guarantees" was presented at ISRR 2024.
Paper "Direct Near-Infrared-Depth Visual SLAM with Active Lighting" was published in IEEE RA-L and presented at IROS.
Paper "A Visual Compass Based on Point and Line Features for UAV High-Altitude Orientation Estimation" was published in Remote Sensing.
